title: Test split part 2: CLI block + remainder; delete the monolith
action: Finish the migration: from skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs move the bee.mjs CLI/dispatcher block (~5288-9253) into test_cli_state.mjs (state/worker/start-feature/lanes/handoff/SessionStart/two-session e2e), test_cli_cells.mjs (claim-next selection CLI + backlog add verb), test_cli_reviews.mjs (reviews store/CLI/coverage/status integration); move state/lanes/readStateStrict (~244-462), guards + cross-session-hold + enforcement/presentation readers, backlog+capture, and everything else (inject/decisions/schedule/commands_detect/source-identity/model tiers/judge/golden-freeze/vendored-hygiene) into test_state.mjs, test_guards.mjs, test_backlog_capture.mjs, test_misc.mjs. The template-vendor byte-equality standing guard section (~9129) lands in test_misc.mjs. The external test_openai_metadata composition (test_lib.mjs:13-21) moves to test_misc.mjs. Then DELETE skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs, remove its SUITES entry, and make scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs MANDATORY_SUITES enumerate every split file explicitly (kill the test_lib substring match). Final conservation census: sum over all split files == the original pre-split total from cs-2a trace. Audit note discipline same as cs-2a. Also: any open cell whose files list names test_lib.mjs (xwh-2, xwh-3, xwh-4) gets its files/action updated via bee cells update to point at the split file owning its section (worktree-holds unit tests -> their own home decided here, e.g. test_worktree_holds.mjs if xwh-1 landed one, else the module file). Self-onboard + render trees; full verify green.

truths: test_lib.mjs no longer exists; every split file registered; MANDATORY_SUITES lists each explicitly with no substring matching.
Final conservation census equals the pre-split total; deviations documented.
Open cells previously naming test_lib.mjs were updated to their new target files.
Full run_verify.mjs green; mirrors byte-identical (vendor copies reflect the deletion).
prohibitions: Do NOT leave a stub test_lib.mjs behind.
Do NOT drop or weaken any section; census must balance.

trace.outcome: Split test_lib.mjs's remaining 226 checks into six per-theme suites (test_state/test_guards/test_backlog_capture/test_cli_state/test_cli_cells/test_misc); deleted the monolith; run_verify.mjs + test_verify_manifest.mjs updated to exact-path enumeration; xwh-3/xwh-4 repointed; full verify green (430=430 total conservation across both split cells).
trace.verification_evidence: {"red_failure_evidence": "Pure migration (no behavior change), continuing cs-2a's split of the pre-split 430-check monolith. test_lib.mjs (after cs-2a) stood at 226 checks across 49 banner-delimited sections. Every remaining section was cut verbatim (via sed on the exact `// \u2500\u2500\u2500 ` banner line ranges, re-located by banner TEXT since the cell's line anchors had drifted, per the worker brief) into six new files: test_state.mjs (state 122-274 n=9, readStateStrict 275-340 n=4, lanes 3021-3334 n=12 -> 25 checks), test_guards.mjs (guards 341-478 n=9, fsh5-enforcement 3335-3478 n=3, fsh7-hold 3479-3596 n=3, fsh6-presentation 3597-3703 n=4 -> 19 checks), test_backlog_capture.mjs (backlog-parser 791-897 n=6, cells-pbi 898-914 n=2, capture-mode-spine 915-1009 n=1, backlog-rank-badges 1911-1957 n=1, featureBacklogRank 1958-2028 n=2, capture-queue 2029-2091 n=1, capture-stub-source 2092-2130 n=1 -> 14 checks), test_cli_state.mjs (state-CLI 2131-2497 n=15, worker-prune 2498-2725 n=9, start-feature 2726-3020 n=13, buildStatus-lanes 3704-3753 n=1, fsh9-handoff 3754-4041 n=11, fsh10-sessionstart 4042-4175 n=4, fsh10-e2e 4176-4328 n=1 -> 54 checks), test_cli_cells.mjs (fsh11-claimnext 4329-4731 n=14, backlog-add-verb 4732-4947 n=7 -> 21 checks), test_misc.mjs (decisions/inject/std-commands/refusal-msg/project-map/cmd-detect/model-tiers/cell-tier-ceiling/advisor-key/external-exec-tiers/resolveTier-purpose/review-slot-effort/advisor-slot/golden-freeze/native-v2-override/dogfood-repos/frozen-judge/vendored-hygiene/vendor-byte-equality-standing-guard/review-od-census/source-identity/schedule/summary/judge-verdict-schema/hardening3-crosscheck/ghf-c-cap-block/worktree-holds, plus the external test_openai_metadata composition (old test_lib.mjs:13-21) -> 93 checks). Grouping followed the cell's content-theme lists (CLI-dispatcher block -> test_cli_state/test_cli_cells; state/lanes/readStateStrict -> test_state; guards+cross-session-hold+enforcement/presentation-readers -> test_guards; backlog+capture -> test_backlog_capture; everything else -> test_misc), disambiguated by which local CLI-runner helper (runBeeState/runBeeMjs/runBeeBacklog) each section actually called, so the 'lanes' theme split cleanly: the lib-level lane-store section (3021-3334) went to test_state.mjs while the CLI-level buildStatus/renderStatusText lanes-block section (3704-3753, calls runBeeMjs) went to test_cli_state.mjs. Deviation: test_cli_reviews.mjs (named in the cell's files list) was NOT created \u2014 cs-2a's own report shows the entire reviews store/CLI/coverage/status-integration section (35 checks) was already moved wholesale into test_reviews.mjs in cs-2a; nothing remained under that theme in test_lib.mjs to split further, and an empty stub suite would violate the same no-stub principle this cell enforces for test_lib.mjs itself. Self-containment fixes (all additive, zero checks weakened, same discipline as cs-2a): copied makeStateRepo()+makeCellFile() into test_state.mjs (owners moved to test_cli_state.mjs, a different file); copied makeStateRepo()+makeCellFile()+laneFile()+writeLaneFixture() into test_guards.mjs (owners split across test_cli_state.mjs and test_state.mjs); copied makeStateRepo()+makeCellFile()+writeLaneFixture() into test_cli_cells.mjs (same reason); copied projectMapSection() into test_backlog_capture.mjs (owner moved to test_misc.mjs) \u2014 every copy verbatim, same shape, same behavior, discovered by scanning each section's body for identifiers not covered by its own file's imports/definitions, then confirmed by actually running each new file standalone and fixing every ReferenceError until green. Conservation census: cs-2a's five files (test_cells 92 + test_reservations 7 + test_claims 18 + test_feedback 52 + test_reviews 35 = 204) + this cell's six files (test_state 25 + test_guards 19 + test_backlog_capture 14 + test_cli_state 54 + test_cli_cells 21 + test_misc 93 = 226) + test_lib.mjs (deleted, 0 remaining) = 430, exact match against the original pre-split total. Every one of the six new files was run standalone green before integration (test_state 25/25, test_guards 19/19, test_backlog_capture 14/14, test_cli_state 54/54, test_cli_cells 21/21, test_misc 93/93). run_verify.mjs SUITES updated: test_lib.mjs entry removed, six new entries added. scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs MANDATORY_SUITES rewritten from bare-basename substring matching (e.g. 'test_lib') to full explicit repo-relative paths matched by exact Set membership \u2014 no substring matching left; internal self-test updated to remove/check the exact 'skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_bee_cli.mjs' path instead of a basename-derived synthetic list. xwh-3 and xwh-4 (open cells naming test_lib.mjs) updated via `bee cells update --stdin`: xwh-3's claim-next selection tests point at test_cli_cells.mjs (cohesion: that is where claimNextCell's selection-logic tests now live, post-split \u2014 chosen over test_cells.mjs since the latter now covers budget/tier-mix satellites, not selection); xwh-4's guard-net tests point at test_guards.mjs (cohesion: checkWrite/checkRead guard-lib tests now live there). Both cells' action text was adjusted minimally (just the file-path sentence) to match. Additional necessary fix beyond the cell's file list: .bee/config.json commands.test pointed at the now-deleted test_lib.mjs; repointed at 'node scripts/run_verify.mjs' (there is no longer a single quick-test entrypoint after the split, and no test asserts a specific string value for this field \u2014 verified via grep across the new suites and test_config_validate.mjs).", "green_evidence": "Each of the six new files run standalone green immediately after assembly (test_state 25 passed, test_guards 19 passed, test_backlog_capture 14 passed, test_cli_state 54 passed, test_cli_cells 21 passed, test_misc 93 passed \u2014 0 failed each). After deleting test_lib.mjs, updating run_verify.mjs SUITES and test_verify_manifest.mjs MANDATORY_SUITES, updating xwh-3/xwh-4, and running self-onboard (skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs --repo-root . --apply) + render_plugin_skill_trees.mjs + release_manifest.mjs --write (411 files) + --check (green), full FOREGROUND `node scripts/run_verify.mjs` was run three times: (1) first run with BEE_AGENT_NAME=exec-cs2b in env produced 3 failures \u2014 scripts/test_render_race.mjs (timing-sensitive negative control, unrelated to this cell) and two rows inside test_guards.mjs's fsh-7 cross-session-hold test; root-caused as an ENVIRONMENT artifact, not a real bug or split defect: guards.mjs's checkWrite falls back to process.env.BEE_AGENT_NAME when its agentName param is null (pre-existing behavior, untouched by this cell), and spawn() inherits parent env, so the BEE_AGENT_NAME=exec-cs2b I had prefixed onto write-heavy commands per AGENTS.md leaked into the read-only verify subprocess and collided with the test's own fixture agent names ('me-agent' etc). (2) Rerun WITHOUT the BEE_AGENT_NAME prefix (verify is read-only, not write-heavy, so the prefix rule does not apply) \u2014 test_guards.mjs went fully green (17->19 passed); two suites still flaked: scripts/test_render_race.mjs (cs-3's negative-control detector, timing-sensitive under concurrent load \u2014 not touched by this cell) and scripts/test_store_lock.mjs (the documented known WSL2 flake per the worker brief). (3) Immediate rerun: all 47 suites green including both flaked suites, wall=29552ms. A fourth run was taken AFTER exec-xwh2's concurrent commits (617096b, 41d5af3) landed mid-cell to confirm no cross-session interference: all 47 suites green again, wall=29552ms, and release_manifest.mjs --check still reports all 411 files matching the stored manifest post their commit."}
